{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182715C6FD37E572D1B9CE84AC"}"},"total":1584},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7543621050917094168","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，虽然这文是有女主的，但女主存在感太低了，一点不影响观看，我都是把他当双男主看，男主和皇帝虽然是友情，但皇帝简直不要太宠男主，沈舟和皇帝的极限拉扯简直不要太好看，他们之间的感情真的好纯粹，那种知己的感觉，还有我觉得沈舟是皇帝的救赎，让他灰暗的人生多了一抹色彩，让一个冷心冷情的皇帝学会了怎样爱人与信任，而且除了男主的高光，其他配角也很鲜活，反正就强烈推荐","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":39,"text":"双男主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774261635B9CE84AC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227543621050917094168%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227400173768338836542%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756388645,"group_id":"7400173768338836542","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1XkNP/IfoY1BcZ2KE697Os=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b93e9c9315694254a55372bca02539b0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793519&x-signature=DixQDmHssnynFUAXSm7dMLn691c%3D","user_id":"805315567430061","user_name":"书荒中的小书虫～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"805315567430061","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7400173768338836542","book_info":{"abstract":"【前期科举+种田+日常+轻松+后期庙堂】前世因身体不好，修身养性，养得性子寡淡的沈舟穿到了古代农家。
沈家举全家之力供读原主，只希望他能中个秀才，可惜原主三次落榜，深受挫折。
一次挨打后，沈家渐渐发现，沈舟变了。
也是这一变，沈家开始惊喜连连。
沈舟这一考，就再也没停下。
县案首，府案首，院案首，乡试第一，会试第一，殿试第一，六元连中！
众人皆道沈舟运气好，他也确实好。
殿试后，他就入了皇上眼。
自此，平步青云不是梦。
朝廷上下无一不羡慕沈舟。
只有沈舟知道，皇上的大腿又哪里有这么好抱的。
多年以后，沈舟心酸地坐上了重臣之位。
沈舟：总算熬到头了（咸鱼瘫）
皇上：呵，是吗......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cbaf94efa2eecc62dcdb44467a0cb178","author":"一只绿耳","author_id":"","book_id":"7400173768338836542","book_name":"举家盼你中秀才，你六元连中？","book_short_name":"伺机谋权","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7400174784878756414","read_count":"27873","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1466037"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"673","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,搞笑轻松,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fbcbafda7e246a7d1b989288846e0136~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445635&x-signature=8UFIYId7O6eEFLlcJeiOxSxSrWM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109472604113","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"721"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182715C6FD37E572D1B9CE84AC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":134405,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":169961,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":13805},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7447325475366126360","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"已经很久没看到想追的小说了，男主很让觉得舒服，有能力但是会藏拙，改变影响了大哥二哥，家人之间都没有隔阂，看完了更新的，个人的想法就是希望男主帮助老百姓过好日子，不忘初心，包括刚刚更新的男主看到了老百姓的困苦，自己也是个不喜欢上班的还是要上班，哈哈哈就跟我们社畜一样，男主的妻子也很让人喜欢，包括结婚时候的忐忑不安都描写出来了，还有自己的心思细腻，就好像俩个人是双相奔赴，其实刚开始看的时候以为男主会找个大部分想同小说类型的妻子，但没想到作者这么会写，个人是非常喜欢的，没有那么多的情情爱爱，双方婚后的理解对方，到这章才开始为以后做打算吧，弄琉璃玻璃之类的，啊啊啊啊啊 催更，恨不得一晚上看完，超级喜欢的，里面的每个人都喜欢。除了攀高枝的笨蛋。","text_exts":[{"e":317,"s":314,"text":"攀高枝","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%94%80%E9%AB%98%E6%9E%9D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774261635B9CE84AC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227447325475366126360%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227400173768338836542%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%94%80%E9%AB%98%E6%9E%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733974439,"group_id":"7400173768338836542","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2aL5sUxjj6W+AZnmlLqySHwwdrbt7l+MdgN+W4Ljf/x","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3eb1088d780f40bca9ef6a3b029bdbdd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791395&x-signature=wu8l0nByzf5csw5K3wES%2FbnMz9M%3D","user_id":"2120296346434784","user_name":"是小貓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2120296346434784","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705275951,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7400173768338836542","book_info":{"abstract":"【前期科举+种田+日常+轻松+后期庙堂】前世因身体不好，修身养性，养得性子寡淡的沈舟穿到了古代农家。
